programme.title: Grease, (1978, Musical)
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: The Bad News Bears, (1976, Comedy)
programme.desc: A major surprise as one of 1976's top-grossing films. THE BAD NEWS BEARS is a movie about children that is refreshing, utterly believable, and quite cleverly funny.

programme.title: Bad News Bears in Breaking Training, (1977, Comedy)
programme.desc: The story picks up the Bears career a year after their infamous second-place finish in the North Valley League. Faced with a chance to play the Houston Toros for a shot at the Japanese champs, they devise a way to get Texas to play at the famed Astrodome.

programme.title: Bad News Bears Go To Japan, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Caught in a clash of cultures and ready to wreak more havoc on Japan than Godzilla, the Bad News Bears are back this time the Bears are spirited off to Tokyo by a slick and sleazy con artist who sees in the team a perfect peg for a get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Up in Smoke, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Grease, (1978, Musical)
programme.desc: Grease is the one that you want! Go back to high school with Pink Lady Sandy (Olivia Newton-John), leader of the bad-boy T-Birds, Danny (John Travolta), and a rockin' and rollin' all-star cast.

programme.title: Monty Python Live at the Hollywood Bowl, (1982, Comedy)
programme.desc: The legendary live show from the Monty Python troupe. Performing many of their greatest sketches from Monty Python's Flying Circus and two Monty Python specials, Monty Python's Fliegender Zirkus, live from the Hollywood Bowl in 1980.

programme.title: Meatballs, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Bill Murray stars as Tripper who guides a fun-seeking collection of lovable campers and libidinous staff members through the unique pleasures of a hysterical coed summer experience.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi vows to overthrow Pegasus for the sake of his Grandpa. Tristan leads an exploration party to uncover Pegasus's secrets. While Joey sleeps, Bandit Keith steals from him the card that permits his entry in the final battle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Under Pegasus's glare, Yugi is distracted from his duel with Mai. After making foolish errors and allowing Mai to gain a huge advantage with her Harpie's Pet Dragon, will Yugi gather his focus or succumb to the pressure?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has rebounded from her previous loss to Joey to become a better duelist. Has Yugi learned from his loss to Kaiba, or is the emotional defeat still weighing on his heart? The answer is in the cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey searches for the card that permits him to enter the final battle, not realizing Bandit Keith has stolen it. As he struggles to accept the fact that Serenity will be blind forever, he receives help from a new friend!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Bandit Keith's Machine deck forces Joey to take the defensive, Joey mimics Keith's battle strategy to metalize his Red-Eyes Black Dragon! Is victory assured, or does the cheater Bandit Keith literally have one last card up his sleeve?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey challenges Yugi for the right to face Pegasus. In a battle between friends, a fierce match ensues between the two people who know each other's strategies and cards.
programme.sub-title: Best of Friends Best of Duelists, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is shocked as Joey uses the Time Wizard card on him. It's the very same card Yugi gave Joey as a sign of friendship!
programme.sub-title: Best of Friends Best of Duelists, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi prepares for the ultimate battle against Pegasus with the souls of Grandpa, Kaiba, and Mokuba on the line.
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Pegasus Match of the Millennium, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus punishes Yugi using the same Toon Deck and mind-reading abilities he used on Kaiba. As Pegasus turns Yugi's monsters against him, Yugi loses the will to battle. Will Pegasus capture Yugi's soul into a card, just like Kaiba?
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Pegasus Match of the Millennium, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi has found a counter to Pegasus's mind-reading ability: Yugi switches back and forth between his two souls! Yugi is able to destroy Pegasus's Toon World, but the duel has just only begun. The next level of the deadly Shadow Game is about to start!
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Pegasus Match of the Millennium, Part 3

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi crumples under the power of the Shadow Game. His friends yell desperate encouragement, but their voices cannot penetrate the sphere of darkness. Yugi's chance at victory is slipping away, as is his life!
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Pegasus Match of the Millennium, Part 4

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus summons Relinquished, a fearsome monster that can consume Yugi's Duel Monsters! Yugi counters with… Kuriboh?
programme.sub-title: Yugi vs. Pegasus Match of the Millennium, Part 5

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi meets a mysterious Egyptian named Shadi who enters Yugi's mind with the Millennium Key. What are these Millennium Items, and do they hold the answer to the mystery behind the Shadow Games?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends return from the Duelist Kingdom only to meet a young girl named Rebecca who demands that Grandpa return Blue-Eyes White Dragon to her.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Rebecca mistakenly believes that Grandpa stole the Blue-Eyes White Dragon from her grandfather. Yugi must defend the Blue-Eyes White Dragon to teach her that it's not the power of the cards, but the heart that's in them that counts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The two-faced Board of Directors of Kaiba Corporation trap Kaiba inside a virtual reality game. Mokuba recruits Yugi and Joey to free Kaiba from this ultimate game where losing equals death!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The quest for Kaiba continues with a little help from… Mai? But can YUGI and friends adapt to a virtual world where the rules and strategies keep changing every step of the way?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends rescue Kaiba, but they are still stuck in the game! The only exit is past a Five-Headed Dragon, but in the difficult duel, Joey, Mokuba, and Mailose all their life points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Duke Devlin defeats Joey and humiliates him in public, forcing Yugi to challenge Duke to a duel. However, this will not be a Duel Monsters duel, but a new game named Dungeon Dice Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In exchange for Joey's freedom, Yugi agrees to give up Duel Monsters forever if he loses. Unfamiliar with the rules, Yugi gets off to a rough start.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi uses his innate gaming skills to turn the tables on Duke, but Duke has one more rule to mention: All creatures take up territory on the grid-like board. With no room to summon any new monsters, Yugi's position is helpless!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Duke's all-powerful Orogoth The Relentless dices Yugi's entire cadre of monsters into shreds, Yugi only has one turn left before he loses all his heart points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: An arcane fortune teller steals the Millennium Puzzle and Yugi must defeat him in a duel to win it back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The mysterious menace controlling Bandit Keith shatters the Millennium Puzzle into pieces before setting the dueling arena ablaze. Can Yugi put the Millennium Puzzle back together and save the spirit before the entire room is engulfed in flames?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of Duel Monsters is revealed. Using the magic of the Millennium Necklace, Egyptian historian Ishizu Ishtar shows Kaiba how Duel Monsters was played millenniums ago.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spirit of the Millennium Puzzle realizes that his memories of ancient Egypt have faded, but Tea helps him uncover the mysteries of his past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi learns that he was a powerful Pharaoh who saved the world five thousand years ago, and he must now save the world again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel. If he loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey's Red-Eyes Black Dragon.
programme.sub-title: Yugi Vs. Rare Hunter Part 1 - Battle City Begins

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter's strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it's too late to stop him. The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck.
programme.sub-title: Yugi Vs. Rare Hunter Part 2 - Up Against Exodia

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey's next on his hit list. What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey's hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba's extrasensory perception was a hoax, that he's not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world's most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm. Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician.

programme.title: Bellamy escapes Doflamingo's control, but it might be too late. His long history with Doflamingo unfolds and leads to an inglorious end. Meanwhile, Hajrudin has been beaten down, but a fire still burns in him to pay back the favor he owes!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Decisive Battle Against the Executives! Proud Hajrudin!

programme.title: Lao G and Don Chinjao duke it out as each brings their most devastating attacks to the battle. But a misunderstanding caused by Baby 5 has Sai and Don Chinjao distracted - are they distracted enough for Lao G to gain the upper hand?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Battle of Love! The New Leader Sai vs. Baby 5!

programme.title: Law is at the whim of Doflamingo and Trebol, while Luffy still has to deal with Bellamy, who fights to keep his honor even after being released by Doflamingo! Meanwhile, Gladius is about to detonate the ground around Cavendish and Bartolomeo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Man's Pride! Bellamy's Last Charge!

programme.title: A mysterious force that resembles Cavendish menaces the battlefield - but while it appears to help Bartolomeo and the others at first, it sets its sights on Robin! Meanwhile, the deeply-wounded Ideo sees Dellinger's horrible true nature!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Strong Wind and a Surge! Hakuba vs. Dellinger!

programme.title: Bartolomeo is in a neck-and-neck battle against Gladius to save Robin, and is faced with an impossible dilemma. With all his options leading to their defeat, can his cunning ploy save the day? Meanwhile, Robin is face to face with Cavendish.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Princess Mansherry's amazing power - to heal living beings completely - is in the hands of the Donquixote executive. If she is able to heal all the executives who've gone down in battle - the Straw Hats and their allies stand no chance!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Señor Pink and Franky continue their knock-down, drag-out, manly fight. As both of them are pushed to their limits, we learn Señor's tragic past! Meanwhile, Princess Mansherry's rescue hits a snag as she stubbornly refuses to leave!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Manly Duel! Señor's Elegy of Love!

programme.title: Franky and Señor Pink end their harrowing duel in a manly way - but victory knocks the wind out of even the winner's sails! Meanwhile, Diamante and Kyros struggle desperately on the Sunflower Field, each demonstrating their extreme prowess.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Stardust of Death! Diamante's Storm of Vicious Attacks!

programme.title: Kyros, unbowed by Diamante's vicious attacks, fights back with the anger and retribution of all of Dressrosa in order to fulfill his promise to protect Rebecca. If he is successful, only a few executives will remain.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Pica loses his temper and turns his full wrath against King Riku, whom he hopes to destroy, ending the revolution against Doflamingo. Meanwhile, Zoro, who has been distracted by Pica and drawn far from the battle, has to hatch a plan to save the king!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Moving Across the Ground! The Giant Statue Pica's Surprise Maneuver!

programme.title: With the lives of King Riku, Usopp, and the others on the old King's Plateau in the balance, Zoro must dig deep and discover a powerful technique to counter Pica's near-unstoppable onslaught. Meanwhile, King Riku ponders what it means to be a good king.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Decisive Battle in Midair! Zoro's New Special Secret Technique Blasts!

programme.title: Zoro finishes off Pica, and those below his crumbling body rush to find shelter. Meanwhile, the Tontattas finish up demolishing the SMILE Factory, and Luffy's hand is forced in his duel with Bellamy!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Taking down Bellamy only enrages Luffy in his fight against Doflamingo, his anger multiplying when he finds Law's lifeless body! Meanwhile, Doflamingo takes the next step to end the game he started, which will endanger everybody in Dressrosa!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: The Birdcage draws tighter and tighter around Dressrosa, threatening to destroy all life on the island kingdom! Meanwhile, Doflamingo stands down Luffy for a final confrontation, but a surprising twist shocks everyone on the top of the Royal Palace!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Blade of Tenacity! The Gamma Knife Counterattack!

programme.title: Law's attack proves powerful - but Doflamingo's power has depths which he and Luffy haven't bargained for. When Doflamingo makes his counterattack, Luffy stares him down with an amazing power.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Collision of Haki! Luffy vs. Doflamingo!

programme.title: Trebol's wrath is fully inflamed as Law summons enough energy to speak, denouncing the Doflamingo Family executives as pawns in Doflamingo's game. But Law gathers enough energy to do more than just speak out.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Unassailable! The Stunning Secret of Trebol!

programme.title: Cavendish has to make a difficult decision when the severely wounded Law begs him to be left behind. Meanwhile, seeing even his Second Gear or Third Gear attacks aren't working against Doflamingo, Luffy decides to use his ultimate technique!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Anger Erupts! I Will Take Everything upon Myself!

programme.title: Luffy and Doflamingo duke it out while the Birdcage tightens its grip on Dressrosa! Zoro sets off with a plan to stop it from slicing apart the country, while Luffy's Fourth Gear proves quite potent against Doflamingo!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: The Birdcage continues its merciless constriction, sending the residents of Dressrosa fleeing towards the center of the island, while King Riku calls out to his people: Survive long enough for Luffy to vanquish the last of the royal family.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Fourth Gear gives Luffy the power he needs to head off Doflamingo at every strike! But the energy required to keep Fourth Gear going starts to take a toll on Luffy. Will he have enough left to finish the job?
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Bounce-man's power has drained Luffy, leaving him in need of a rest before he can reuse his Haki, but luckily the gladiators from the Colosseum have come around and are focusing on taking down Doflamingo! Sabo steps in at a crucial moment.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Flame Dragon King! Protect Luffy's Life!

programme.title: With Luffy and so many of the Straw Hats' allies incapacitated, victory seems inevitable for Doflamingo - but the compassion of Mansherry may be enough to turn the tide and renew their hope - to stop the Birdcage!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: With just over a minute to spare, everyone in Dressrosa turns their efforts towards slowing down the Birdcage as it squeezes the life out of the country! Meanwhile, Viola seeks Doflamingo out herself, for a shocking confrontation!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: As Long as We Breathe! Stop the Deadly Birdcage!

programme.title: Only a bit more time remains before Luffy returns to the scene! But as time slips by, those who had been roused by Princess Mansherry's powers begin to falter! Meanwhile, Rebecca, under the control of Doflamingo, is about to attack Viola!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Dead or Alive! A Fateful Countdown!

programme.title: Luffy regains enough Haki to face off against Doflamingo, but his health is still poor. With the Birdcage closing in, is there a technique left in his repertoire that is strong enough to take down Doflamingo?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Attack on a Celestial! Luffy's King Kong Gun of Anger!

programme.title: With Doflamingo thoroughly quashed and the Birdcage collapsing, the people of Dressrosa shed tears of joy remembering the hardships they've endured, and the actions taken by Luffy and the others to free them.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Jesus Burgess of the Blackbeard Pirates tries to agitate Sabo, mocking Ace's final words in order to unsettle him enough that he can try to steal the Flare-Flare Fruit! Meanwhile, people of Dressrosa beg King Riku to resume the crown.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Unheard-of! Admiral Fujitora’s Surprising Decision!

programme.title: Repercussions of Doflamingo's defeat reverberate around the world! Fujitora's actions put the Navy in a tight spot, and the "Worst Generation" beings to stir into action!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sending a Shock Wave! The Worst Generation Goes Into Action!

programme.title: The combatants in the battle for Dressrosa can finally begin to recoup, but those who stay awake are treated to the story of how Sabo joined the Revolutionary Army!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Birth of the Legend! The Adventures of the Revolutionary Warrior Sabo!

programme.title: Sabo recounts his surprising reunion with Luffy at the Colosseum as the Straw Hats and the others continue to recoup. Meanwhile, Fujitora gambles on how to make his next move - and the odds are in Luffy's favor!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Brothers' Bond! The Untold Story Behind Luffy and Sabo's Reunion!

programme.title: As Sabo departs, our attention shifts to the other Straw Hats waging a fierce battle on a mysterious island. And a new drama is set into motion as ill portents fall from the sky!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Strongest Creature! One of the Four Emperors - Kaido, King of the Beasts!

programme.title: As Luffy and the others begin to come to their senses, major players in the Navy arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats! Also, Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a fake cover story - but why?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fujitora Takes Action! The Complete Siege of the Straw Hats!

programme.title: Fujitora's flirting with chance has turned out poorly for the Straw Hats as the full Navy force bears down on Dressrosa searching for the pirates! Luffy and the others make a mad dash for the east port to get off the island.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A State of Emergency! Rebecca Is Kidnapped!

programme.title: Robocop, (1987, Action)
programme.desc: Detroit in the near future. A cop who dies in the line of duty is transformed into a crime-fighting cyborg by the corporation which now runs the police department. The only hitch: this "perfect" cop still seeks revenge on the creeps who mutilated him.

programme.title: Starship Troopers, (1997, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Courageous soldiers travel to the distant and desolate Klendathu system for the ultimate showdown between the species.

programme.title: Hollow Man, (2000, Sci-Fi Horror)
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon and Elisabeth Shue play former lovers who, along with a team of other scientists like themselves, discover the secret of invisibility. Rating: R

programme.title: Universal Soldier, (1992, Action)
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Robocop, (1987, Action)
programme.desc: Detroit in the near future. A cop who dies in the line of duty is transformed into a crime-fighting cyborg by the corporation which now runs the police department. The only hitch: this "perfect" cop still seeks revenge on the creeps who mutilated him.

programme.title: Robocop 2, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: This first sequel pits Robocop against a gang of drug dealers and the title creature--a supposedly improved version of himself that has gone berserk.

programme.title: Robocop 3, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: In this second sequel to the 1987 hit, RoboCop leaves the force and joins the rebellion to battle the evil business corporation OCP, which uses a police-like group to remove the homeless people who populate the site of a future upscale development.

programme.title: The Island, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: A man goes on the run after he discovers that he is actually a "harvested being", and is being kept along with others in a utopian facility.

programme.title: Chato's Land, (1972, Western)
programme.desc: Chato, a half-Apache horseman, is on the run from a blood-thirsty posse led by an ex-Confederate officer, who is determined to see him dead. Eventually, the pursued and the pursuers will become reversed, thanks to the unforgiving, cruel desert.

programme.title: Big Jake, (1971, Action)
programme.desc: An aging Texas cattle man who has outlived his time swings into action when outlaws kidnap his grandson and wound his son.

programme.title: The Alamo, (1960, Western)
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: McLintock!, (1963, Western)
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: Bells Of Capistrano, (1942, Western)
programme.desc: A feud between rodeo companies accelerates when both want Gene Autry, as a crowd-drawing added attraction. This film features Gene singing five hits, including "In Old Capistrano" and "Forgive Me."

programme.title: Call Of The Canyon, (1942, Western)
programme.desc: Gene Autry leads cattlemen in rebellion when a packing company rep cheats them. A gal’s future depends on the company's radio spots for her show! It gets exciting when the owner appears incognito.

programme.title: Home in Wyomin', (1942, Western)
programme.desc: Radio star Gene Autry must solve a murder mystery at the Frontier Days pageant in Wyoming that involves a newspaper photographer, Chicago gangsters, a deserted mine, and a surprise ending.

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dynamite, (1972, Western)
programme.desc: The results are explosive when an Irish terrorist (James Coburn) with a dynamite obsession teams up with a Mexican peasant-turned- revolutionary (Rod Steiger) in this action-packed tale of power and politics. Directed by the legendary Sergio Leone.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove, (1989, Western)
programme.desc: Texas Rangers and long-time ranching partners Gus McCrae and Woodrow Call meet their old friend Jake, and decide to strike out from their south Texas base and drive a cattle herd to Montana.

programme.title: Legally Blonde, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: Elle Woods has it all, but when her boyfriend goes to Harvard, Ellie rallies all her resources to get into Harvard Law. But law school is a far cry from the comforts of home. Elle must wage the battle of her life, for herself and for all blondes!

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde, (2003, Comedy)
programme.desc: Now a rising lawyer, Elle Woods is about to make partner at her firm, she and Emmett are still love, and her hair is still healthy. Elle heads to D.C. and take matters into her own hands.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days, (2003, Romance)
programme.desc: A "How to..." columnist agrees to write a first-hand account about what it takes to drive a man out of your life... in exactly 10 days.

programme.title: Failure to Launch, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: Tripp, a 35 year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him. It’s free, he’s got a great room, and mom does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little…push.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out, (2014, Comedy)
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed moms' night out. But to enjoy it, they need their husbands to watch the kids for a few hours-what could go wrong?

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days, (2003, Romance)
programme.desc: A "How to..." columnist agrees to write a first-hand account about what it takes to drive a man out of your life... in exactly 10 days.

programme.title: Failure to Launch, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: Tripp, a 35 year-old who still lives with his parents. And who can blame him. It’s free, he’s got a great room, and mom does the laundry. Desperate to get him out of the house, his parents hire a gorgeous woman, Paula, to give him a little…push.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out, (2014, Comedy)
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a long-needed moms' night out. But to enjoy it, they need their husbands to watch the kids for a few hours-what could go wrong?

programme.title: The group lives a more peaceful life at the prison and strives to hold onto humanity; problems arise when Rick encounters a new survivor.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Facing a new enemy, Rick abandons his quiet lifestyle so that he and the others can fight to protect their hard-won livelihood.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: A group leaves the prison to search for supplies; the remaining members of the group deal with recent losses.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Daryl and a small group set out on foot in search of medicine, but their mission faces obstacles; Rick and Carol find two uninfected stragglers in a nearby town.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Assorted enemies pressure Rick and the group; the survivors and the prison may reach a breaking point.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Following his defeat at Woodbury, the Governor wanders aimlessly until he encounters a family in need.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: At the camp outside the prison, the addition of new members threatens the peace; something new unfolds as the Governor plans his next move.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Things finally begin to calm at the prison until Rick and the group face imminent danger when the Governor arrives with his forces.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Rick and Carl look for shelter while Rick deals with old wounds; those left at the prison consider whether survival alone will be enough.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Beth remains hopeful, and she and Daryl search for other survivors of the Governor's attack; the now-divided group faces obstacles in their quest for safety.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Rick faces a number of threats while Carl and Michonne look for supplies; Glenn and Tara meet strangers on an important mission; other group members deal with their pasts.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: In the woods after fleeing the prison, Beth makes a request that sends her and Daryl on an enlightening mission.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Daryl and Beth find shelter while another group has a realization about their own protection; Sasha, Bob and Maggie clash over a search mission.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: After finding and establishing a new shelter, members of the group consider things returning to how they were before; Carol must make a difficult choice.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Daryl struggles to fit in with his new group while Glenn finds Maggie's messages and races to catch up to her.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Many paths collide on each group's travels; Rick remembers the past and faces sheer brutality; the group struggles to survive.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa learns that Usagi is Sailor Moon. Eager to return to the future, she steals Usagi's Silver Crystal and flees, only to be ambushed by Rubeus.
programme.sub-title: A UFO Appears: The Sailor Guardians Abducted

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rubeus succeeds in taking four of the five Sailor Guardians prisoner. He demands that Sailor Moon bring Chibi-Usa and the Silver Crystal to him.
programme.sub-title: Defeat Rubeus: The Battle in Space

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa falls into a coma. Usagi and the others are at a loss, when a Sailor Guardian calling herself Sailor Pluto suddenly appears before them.
programme.sub-title: The Mysterious New Guardian: Sailor Pluto Appears

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Black Moon clan sends down its next operative, Esmeraude, to open the Dark Gate in 20th century Tokyo.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi is still depressed over Mamoru calling off their relationship. Ami and Mako try to cheer her up by taking Usagi to a promise ring workshop.
programme.sub-title: Shared Feelings: Usagi and Mamoru in Love Once Again

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A strange new flu is causing everyone to get sick, including the Sailor Guardians. Minako takes it upon herself to look after her sick friends.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Artemis is out to prove he is capable after being teased by Luna. He encounters a suspicious-looking man who is gathering stray animals.
programme.sub-title: Artemis's Adventure: The Monster Animal Kingdom

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The school test results are posted, and Ami is at the top of her class. She finds herself becoming isolated after rumors that she cheated on the test.
programme.sub-title: The Terrifying Illusion: Ami All Alone

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: After being out sick, Chibi-Usa returns to school eager to see her friends. But to her surprise, her friends and teachers begin attacking her.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Gate Is Completed? The Targeted Elementary School

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa decides to return to save her mother. With support from the Sailor Guardians and Tuxedo Mask, she opens the Door of Space and Time.
programme.sub-title: Journey to the Future: Battle in the Space-Time Corridor

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Arriving in the future, the Sailor Guardians stand in shock as they see the ruins of what used to be Crystal Tokyo.
programme.sub-title: The Shocking Future: Dimande's Dark Ambition

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Tuxedo Mask rescues Sailor Moon from Black Moon’s castle. But before they can all celebrate, a giant dragon appears to destroy the Crystal Palace.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Wiseman brainwashes Chibi-Usa and turns her into the Dark Queen. The Sailor Guardians return to present-day Earth to find her.
programme.sub-title: The Dark Queen: Birth of Black Lady

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Saphir learns of Wiseman’s true intentions and tries to warn his brother, only to be attacked by Wiseman himself.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The appearance of the giant Malefic Black Crystal Tower is wreaking havoc. Sailor Moon and the Guardians enter the tower to put an end to this.
programme.sub-title: Believing in Love and the Future: Usagi's Decision

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Dark Gate opens, and Dark Energy spreads everywhere. To stop this, the Sailor Guardians must defeat Black Lady.
programme.sub-title: The Final Battle Between Light and Dark: Pledge of Love for the Future

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Peace has returned, and the Sailor Guardians take a moment to look back at their past battles as they prepare for their next challenge.
programme.sub-title: Usagi and the Girls' Resolve: Prelude to a New Battle

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A new enemy called the Death Busters appears, whose members aim to get their hands on the talismans that can only be found in pure-hearted humans.
programme.sub-title: Premonition of the Apocalypse: The Mysterious New Guardians Appear

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Silver Crystal loses its shine and that means Usagi cannot transform. Mamoru tries to cheer Usagi up.
programme.sub-title: The Rod of Love is Born: Usagi's New Transformation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Minako sneak off to the arcade to take a break. The girls are approached by a handsome student named Haruka Tenoh, who wishes to join them.
programme.sub-title: A Handsome Boy? Haruka Tenoh's Secret

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi asks her friends to help her become a better person worthy of being Mamoru’s bride.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Idol: The Graceful Genius Michiru

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Motoki’s little sister Unazuki is a pure-hearted girl who dreams of sharing her first kiss with the person she truly loves.
programme.sub-title: Protect the Pure Heart: The Three-Way Battle

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A small misunderstanding causes Umino and Naru to believe that the other is no longer interested in them.
programme.sub-title: Let Moon Help with Your Love Problems

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Kaolinite has a new target: Makoto. When Haruka and Michiru find out, they decide to use Makoto as bait in order to obtain her talisman.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Kaolinite sets her eyes on Ami, believing that the famous girl genius would possess a pure heart full of confidence.
programme.sub-title: The Labyrinth of Water: Ami Targeted

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Realizing that the two mysterious Sailor Guardians Uranus and Neptune are also after the talismans, Kaolinite sends a Daimon to get rid of them.
programme.sub-title: To Save Our Friends: Moon and Uranus Join Forces

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rei’s been spending the past several nights chanting to learn the meaning behind the strange nightmares she’s been having.
programme.sub-title: A Man's Kindness: Yuichiro Heartbroken by Rei

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Seeing the happy couples around her, Minako starts questioning her life as a Sailor Guardian and the sacrifices she has to make.
programme.sub-title: I Want to Quit Being a Sailor Guardian: Minako's Dilemma

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Kaolinite is confident that she has finally found a person possessing the talisman. Aided by a Daimon, Kaolinate goes after her next target: Usagi.
programme.sub-title: Usagi in Tears: A Glass Slipper for My Birthday

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Taking Tuxedo Mask as a hostage, Kaolinite tells Usagi and the Sailor Guardians to come to the top of Tokyo Tower for their final showdown.
programme.sub-title: The Stolen Pure Heart: Usagi's Crisis

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Following Kaolinite’s death, Eudial takes over and begins searching for the talismans. Her first target is Maya, a world-renowned Taiko drummer.
programme.sub-title: The Arrival of a Small Pretty Guardian

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa has returned from the future to complete her training as a Sailor Guardian. She is to learn how to make friends in the twentieth century.

programme.title: Alvo Duplo, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Dois caras durões e pertencentes a lados opostos da lei vão unir forças para dar um ponto final em uma onda de assassinatos brutais, mas a tarefa não será nada fácil e muito sangue vai rolar. Gêneros: Crime Elenco: Christian, Slater, Stallone, Sylvester Diretor: Walter Hill

programme.title: Shade - Nos Bastidores do Jogo, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Três vigaristas, decidem armar o maior golpe do ano e participam do jogo de cartas mais disputado de Las Vegas, enfrentando o mestre do pôquer para faturar um prêmio milionário. Só que para isso, eles vão ter que lidar com a máfia. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Stuart Townsend, Sylvester Stallone, Jamie Foxx, Gabriel Byrne, Thandiwe Newton, Melanie Griffith, Hal Holbrook, Roger Guenveur Smith, Bo Hopkins, Din... Diretor: Damian Nieman

programme.title: Fogo contra Fogo, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Um bombeiro fora de serviço testemunha um assassinato nas mãos de uma gangue de gangsters. Ele entra no programa de proteção a testemunhas até depor, mas não pode se esconder por muito tempo da gangue, então decide agir por conta própria. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Josh Duhamel, Bruce Willis, Rosario Dawson Diretor: David Barrett

programme.title: Vidas Importam, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. As vidas dos policiais de Nova York colidem em histórias que se chocam em conflitos de raça, poder, derrotas e traição. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Ice-T, Jules Willcox, Hassan Johnson, Robert Clohessy, Maurice Benard, Fredro Starr, Marc John Jefferies, Drew Allen, Victor Girone, Chris Kerson Diretor: Brendan Kyle Cochrane

programme.title: Instinto Selvagem 2, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. A romancista Catherine está novamente em apuros com a lei e a Scotland Yard nomeia o psiquiatra Dr. Michael Glass para avaliá-la. No entanto, como o detetive Nick Curran antes dele, Glass fica fascinado por Tramell e é atraído para um jogo sedutor. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Sharon Stone, David Morrissey, Charlotte Rampling, David Thewlis, Stan Collymore, Indira Varma, Heathcote Williams, Hugh Dancy, Terence Harvey, Jan Ch... Diretor: Michael Caton-Jones

programme.title: Redes do Crime, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Dois amigos, se envolvem com o crime, mas o vício e os planos de um grande roubo os levam à prisão. Anos depois, Brian, volta para casa, mas precisa enfrentar a realidade: o crime moldou sua vida. uscando redenção, ele luta para reconstruir sua família. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Ethan Hawke, Mark Ruffalo, Amanda Peet, Donnie Wahlberg, Will Lyman, Brian Goodman, Angela Featherstone, Edward Lynch, Johnny Serret, Lenny Clarke Diretor: Brian Goodman

programme.title: Dose dupla, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Dois agentes especiais precisam se unir contra um cartel de drogas mexicano depois que uma operação secreta acaba gerando resultados catastróficos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Denzel Washington, Mark Wahlberg, Paula Patton Diretor: Baltasar Kormákur

programme.title: O Guardião, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Um policial de Los Angeles voa para o Novo México para trabalhar como guarda-costas para a filha de um poderoso empresário. Quando gangsters a sequestram, ele os procura para resgatá-la e protegê-la. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: Batalha dos Impérios, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. O general romano Lucius lidera uma legião de mil soldados no país e com o comandante do protetorado das Regiões Ocidentais, Huo An, ele luta para derrotar o assassino Tiberius e restaurar a soberania da China. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jackie Chan, John Cusack, Adrien Brody Diretor: Daniel Lee

programme.title: Risco Absoluto, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Liberado após seis anos preso por um crime que não cometeu, Shane Danielsnão demora a se meter novamente em encrenca. A estrela de Against the Ropes, Meg Ryan, como Kallen, uma audaciosa, descarada gerente de boxe em formação, determinada a converter “Lethal” Luther Shaw (Omar Epps) de um mero punk de rua a um pugilista profissional de classe mundial. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Meg Ryan, Omar Epps, Tony Shalhoub, Timothy Daly, Kerry Washington, Charles S. Dutton, Joe Cortese, Skye Mccole Bartusiak, Tory Kittles, Sean Bell Diretor: Charles Dutton

programme.title: Suavidade de Corpos, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. Uma vez o mais bizarro dos lutadores profissionais, Khosrow Vaziri, se tornou uma das personalidades mais ultrajantes do Twitter. Mas a história por trás da grande personalidade é crua, comovente, emocional e quase inacreditável. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Morgan Krantz, Dasha Nekrasova, Nadine Dubois Diretor: Jordan Blady

programme.title: Nunca Te Amei, (1994)
programme.desc: 1994. Finney interpreta um professor de estudos clássicos brilhante mas severo numa elegante escola preparatória que é forçado a deixar o emprego e a perceber que é desprezado em sala de aula e em casa. programme.title: O Destino de Uma Vida, (1995)
programme.desc: 1995. Jessica Lange vive uma mãe adotiva que dá uma nova chance na vida a uma criança abandonada. Berry é a mãe biológica que passa sua vida a limpo e vai recuperar seu filho. Halle Berry é a mãe biológica que passa sua vida a limpo e vai recuperar seu filho. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Jessica Lange, Halle Berry, Cuba Gooding Jr, David Strathairn, Samuel L. programme.title: Rebeldes, (1996)
programme.desc: 1996. Esse filme é sobre quatro alunas de ensino médio que descobrem que todas estão sendo obrigadas a ter relações sexuais com o professor de biologia. Essa descobrta faz com que se tornem aliadas e amigas. Logo depois, conseguem a vingança do professor. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Hedy Burress, Angelina Jolie, Jenny Lewis, Jenny Shimizu, Sarah Rosenberg, Peter Facinelli Diretor: Annette Haywood-Carter

programme.title: Jogada de Risco, (1997)
programme.desc: 1997. John (John C. Reilly), um fracassado encalhado em Reno, está duro. É aí que chega Sydney, que fica com pena dele, paga um café da manhã e lhe dá algumas dicas sobre como ganhar dinheiro nos cassinos. Dois anos depois, John torna-se parceiro de Sydney. Gêneros: Crime Elenco: Philip Baker Hall, John C. Reilly, Gwyneth Paltrow, Samuel L. Jackson, F. William Parker Diretor: Paul Anderson

programme.title: Tráfico de Mulheres, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Após serem traficadas através de uma elaborada rede global de tráfico de pessoas, órgãos e drogas, três meninas acabam em um bordel no Texas como escravas sexuais. Elas juntam suas forças para tentar escapar e reconquistar sua liberdade. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Qualquer Preço, (1998)
programme.desc: 1998. O advogado especialista em danos pessoais Jan só aceita grandes casos que sejam resolvidos com segurança fora do tribunal. Embora o caso mais recente pareça simples, ele se envolve em uma batalha épica, na qual está disposto arristar sua carreira. programme.title: Um Jogo de Mestres, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dois gângster sonham em sair do tráfico. Ao participarem do transporte de um grande carregamento de cocaína, o navio vira e eles perdem toda a encomenda. Com uma grande dívida, planejam um golpe em Berlin para conseguirem o dinheiro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Everly - Implacável e Perigosa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma escrava sexual encarcerada por anos pelo chefe da máfia Yakuza enfrenta uma série de criminosos japoneses, a fim de proteger sua mãe e salvar sua filha, que não vê há anos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Era da Escuridão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Na década de 1920, durante a ocupação japonesa da Coreia e da China, guerreiros enfrentam policiais e agentes japoneses tentando contrabandear explosivos pela fronteira e utilizando meios violentos para alcançar os seus objetivos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Perdido em Londres, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em meio ao caos de Londres, Woody Harrelson luta para chegar em casa e encontrar sua família ao enfrentar um escândalo que ameaça arruinar seu casamento. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Aventura e Tanto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O cão vira-lata Pluto aparece de repente e muda a vida da família Davis, que está enfrentando tempos difíceis. Em pouco tempo, ele salva uma criança, traz conforto a um garoto doente e repara um relacionamento desgastado de pai e filho. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Max Steel, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Max é um adolescente de 16 anos que está passando por um período de descobertas. Entretanto, as transformações na vida do jovem estão relacionadas aos incríveis poderes que ele descobre ter quando entra em contato com uma força extraterrestre. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, junto com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestra BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Nezha - Correndo pela Vida, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A equipe Lions de Fórmula 1 perde seu principal piloto e coloca em seu lugar o campeão do simulador de corrida Du Jieke. Com um oponente forte e conflitos a resolver, a equipe enfrenta uma batalha feroz. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Coração de Campeão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em uma universidade de prestígio, a vida de uma equipe de remo derrotada muda para sempre quando um veterano do exército assume o cargo de treinador no último ano de estudos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: À Espera da Chuva, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após a morte misteriosa de seu pai, uma jornalista volta à sua cidade natal no interior. Ao chegar, descobre que o local está devastado pela seca e se tornou um lugar atormentado por gangues e os maus efeitos da pobreza extrema. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Rota de Fuga, (1970)

programme.desc: 2019. As crianças vikings Røskva e Tjalfe embarcam em uma aventura para Valhalla com os deuses Thor e Loki. A vida em Asgard, no entanto, acaba sendo ameaçada pelo temido lobo Fenrir e pelos arqui-inimigos bárbaros dos deuses. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Asbjørn Krogh Nissen, Roland Møller, Salóme Gunnarsdóttir, Patricia Schumann, Jacob Lohmann, Andreas Jessen, Lára Jóhanna Jónsdóttir, Stine Fischer Christensen, Dulfi Al-Jabouri, Ali Sivandi Diretor: Fenar Ahmad

programme.title: Em Busca do Paraíso, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Forçado fazer uma jornada perigosa, um nobre guerreiro se depara com inúmeras dificuldades, lugares misteriosos, magia e aventura para chegar ao que seria o paraíso distante. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Patrick Thompson, Peta Sergeant, Alan Powell, In-Pyo Cha, Karyme Lozano, Ricky Kim, Fernanda Romero, Asger Folmann, Eric Tiede, Tyler Fleming Diretor: Matt Bilen (Director)

programme.title: Congo, (1995)
programme.desc: 1995. Quando uma expedição desaparece no Congo, um grupo é enviado para procura-la, em uma aventura cheia de acontecimentos, tecnologia e muito suspense. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Laura Linney, Dylan Walsh, Ernie Hudson Diretor: Frank Marshall

programme.title: Crônicas da Tribo Fantasma, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Quando fósseis gigantes são descobertos perto da Mongólia, uma expedição é organizada para analisá-los. Quando uma explosão deixa os membros da equipe de escavação enterrados no subsolo, eles descobrem um templo ciclópico e bestas gigantes antigas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Torpedo: U-235, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. No auge da Segunda Guerra Mundial, o comandante Stan e um grupo de corajosos soldados da resistência recebem uma missão suicida de capturar um perigoso submarino alemão carregado de urânio. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Última Fronteira, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Wren e Miguel trabalham nos países mais perigosos do continente africano. Apesar da tragédia que os rodeia, quando se encontram nasce o amor e começam uma relação apaixonada. Mas as situações extremas os colocam em perigo constante. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Caçador de Demônios, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O caçador de demônios Jebediah Woodley viaja até uma pequena cidade ao sul do Mississippi na expectativa de enfrentar um demônio. Quando a entidade maligna é acidentalmente libertada, ela começa a possuir e matar os moradores da região. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Massacre da Família Manson, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1992, a cantora de rock Margot Lavigne se muda para a casa em que a Família Manson assassinou a atriz Sharon Tate. Não demora muito para a vida da cantora e de seus companheiros de banda se transformar em um pesadelo infernal. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Minúsculo - A Vida Privada de Insetos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma imprudente joaninha insulta um enxame de abelhas cuja colmeia está sobre um barco de lixo, provocando uma perseguição em alta velocidade pelas ruas da cidade. Enquanto isso, uma aranha se mete em problemas. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Leonardo tenta se aproximar de Irene; Rebeca aproveita a ausência de Leonardo para ver seu amante; María Luísa visita Leo na prisão; Carlos Ernesto intimida Alejandra. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Julieta proíbe Carlos Ernesto de reabrir o caso de assassinato de Miguel; Felipe confronta Alejandra, reunindo provas de seus erros para que ela seja demitida. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Carlos Ernesto e Virginia passam a noite juntos, mas Trinidad e Jimena não aprovam essa união. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Virginia convence Julieta de que ela é inocente e ama Carlos Ernesto; Leonardo confessa ao irmão que acredita que Mateo é seu filho. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Rodrigo propõe a Alejandra que os dois fujam juntos antes que sejam descobertos; Adolfo não confia mais em Rodrigo e ameaça Alejandra para que ela entregue as provas que tem; Felipe pede que Irene se torne legalmente sua esposa. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Em Busca da Carta Proibida, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Klaas imprime obras de literatura proibidas pela igreja, e é pego pela Inquisição, que está buscando por uma carta perdida escrita por Martinho Lutero. Com isso, o filho Storm é forçado a também procurar tal carta, já que ela poderá libertar seu pai. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Uma História de Amor e Fúria, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um homem com quase 600 anos de idade acompanha a história do Brasil. Ele enfrenta as batalhas entre tupinambás e tupiniquins, passa pela Balaiada e o movimento de resistência contra a ditadura militar, antes de enfrentar a guerra pela água em 2096. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Max Steel, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Max é um adolescente de 16 anos que está passando por um período de descobertas. Entretanto, as transformações na vida do jovem estão relacionadas aos incríveis poderes que ele descobre ter quando entra em contato com uma força extraterrestre. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Sob o Domínio dos Robôs, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A Terra foi conquistada por Robôs de uma galáxia distante. Os sobreviventes estão confinados em suas casas tentando sobreviver a ameaça constante. Mas, uma gangue de adolescentes pode ser a única esperança. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: História de um Assassinato, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Atriz de sucesso se debate durante um pesadelo em que luta, atira e mata seu ex-namorado traficante. Ao acordar, ela descobre que o assassinato realmente ocorreu no dia anterior e que Sal, morto, está em um baú em sua sala de estar. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Golpe de Risco, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Três ladrões aplicam o golpe de suas vidas e roubam joias durante o Festival de Cinema de Cannes, mas o verdadeiro desafio começa quando eles precisam escapar de um lendário detetive francês que os persegue por toda a Europa. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Imortais, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O impiedoso rei Hipérion busca o arco de Épiro para dominar o mundo e destruir os deuses. O único que pode detê-lo é Teseu, um corajoso jovem escolhido por Zeus. Com a ajuda da sacerdotisa Fedra, ele comandará essa batalha épica. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Acima das Nuvens, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Há 20 anos, Maria ficou famosa por sua interpretação no teatro. Agora, ela tem que enfrentar que uma jovem estrela de Hollywood irá interpretar o mesmo papel. Além disso, ela é convidada a dividir o palco com a novata, mas em outro papel. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Homem Comum, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um criminoso de guerra procurado mundo afora conhece uma empregada e um estranho relacionamento surge entre eles. Quando a calmaria parece estabelecida na vida dele, ela descobre que há uma recompensa milionária para quem souber onde o fugitivo está. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Garota em Chamas - Rebelião, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ela perdeu a memória ainda jovem, mas essas lembranças escondem segredos sombrios. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Enquanto Houver Esperança, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angélica é uma adolescente de 16 anos que luta contra uma forma rara de câncer. E, enquanto seus pais batalham para custear seu tratamento e ganhar mais tempo de vida para a garota, ela se apaixona pela primeira vez. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A História de Wim de A a Z, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Conheça a história do órfão Wim, um menino que quer muito ir à escola em vez de passar o tempo todo trabalhando forçadamente na fábrica da cidade. Com muita força de vontade, Wim consegue escapar e encontrar novos amigos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Rei da Montanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Espen Ash Lad, filho de um pobre agricultor, embarca em uma missão perigosa com seus irmãos para salvar a princesa de um vilão conhecido como o Rei da Montanha. O objetivo é ganhar uma recompensa e salvar a fazenda da sua família da ruína. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Meu Querido Elfo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mãe solteira compra um apartamento antigo, sem saber que uma criatura mítica, um elfo, vive no apartamento há séculos. Os novos donos da casa precisam fazer amizade com a criatura, cuja tarefa é justamente proteger o local de uma bruxa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: E Agora? A Mamãe Saiu de Férias!, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Giulia, mãe de três crianças elétricas, decide ir viajar sem a família por dez dias, e o caos da casa sobra para Carlo, marido e pai que vive apenas para o trabalho. Perdido e com um problema nas mãos, ele tem que se virar para dar conta. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Jungle - Protegendo a Selva, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dipankar Nair gerencia santuário de elefantes ameaçado por caçadores de marfim. Seu filho Raj, veterinário de Mumbai, visita o local no aniversário da morte da mãe e se aproxima dos elefantes Bhola e Didi. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Uma Grande Amizade, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Flora é uma elefanta circense que não consegue mais executar seus truques e vai ser sacrificada. Na noite anterior à data da eutanásia, a filha do proprietário do circo a salva. Juntas, elas enfrentam desafios para chegar à reserva animal. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 2007. Randy usa a palavra “negro”, ao vivo na TV, e passa vexame publicamente. Stan tenta entender os sentimentos de Token sobre o assunto. Enquanto isso, uma pessoa pequena visita a escola de South Park e Cartman não consegue parar de rir dele. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T11E01

programme.title: 2007. Cartman faz uma brincadeira que terminou com um mal-entendido envolvendo seu pai e uma posição um tanto quanto constrangedora. Agora, Butters deve ir a um acampamento de cura gay. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T11E02

programme.title: 2007. A escola está sofrendo com uma grande infestação de piolhos! Quando Garrison se recusa a dedurar de quem é a cabeça com mais piolhos da escola, Cartman Faz com que as crianças pensem que é Kenny quem tem os piolhos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T11E03

programme.title: 2007. Os cidadãos de South Park estão se preparando para a chegada de Hillary Clinton para um grande comício. Enquanto isso, Cartman suspeita que um novo aluno muçulmano esteja envolvido em um possível ataque terrorista. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T11E04

programme.title: 2007. Stan quer saber a verdadeira razão para as crianças decorarem os ovos de Páscoa e o que ovos e coelhos tem a ver com a morte de Jesus. Para chegar à verdade, Kyle e Stan se envolvem com uma sociedade bizarra que guarda um segredo lendário. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T11E05

programme.title: 2007. A Professora Garrison leva outro fora, mas dessa vez ela decide descontar nos seus alunos do quarto ano. Os garotos se cansam das mudanças de humor da professora, e descobrem que podem contratar pessoas para ajudá-los. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T11E06

programme.title: 2007. O número de sem-teto aumenta e eles comem, dormem e imploram por esmola pela cidade. Enquanto os adultos tentam encontrar soluções criativas para lidar com eles, os garotos estão procurando uma forma de resolver o problema pra sempre. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T11E07

programme.title: 2007. Após ver um garoto com Síndrome de Tourette em uma loja, Cartman fica obcecado por isso. Ele descobre que se aparentar ter a doença Tourette, ele poderá dizer o que quiser sem precisar encarar consequências. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T11E08

programme.title: 2007. Randy Marsh se torna um herói local em South Park quando os amigos veem o tamanho do seu “barro”. Depois de conversar com os amigos, Randy acredita que possa ser um candidato para o Record Mundial. Será que mais alguém pode desafiá-lo? Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T11E09

programme.title: 2007. Cartman jura que viu um duende. Ele está tão obcecado com isso, que inclusive faz uma aposta com Kyle para provar que os duendes existem. Eles encontram o duende, e agora Kyle precisa cumprir com a aposta. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T11E10
